phrases.intent_en: Where is the traditional fishing room?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de pesca tradicional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHSH-kuh truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: A sala mantém elementos da herança piscatória da Nazaré, servindo como espaço de memória local.

likely_response.local: Siga as placas para a Sala de pesca tradicional.
likely_response.pronunciation: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHSH-kuh truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL.
likely_response.translation_en: Follow the signs to the traditional fishing room.

responses.english: Follow the signs to the traditional fishing room.
responses.phonetic: SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHSH-kuh truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL.
responses.french: Siga as placas para a Sala de pesca tradicional.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de pesca tradicional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHSH-kuh truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL?

likely_response.local: Pergunte ao garçom ou ao chefe de sala, eles podem indicar a localização.
likely_response.pronunciation: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the waiter or the head waiter, they can indicate the location.

responses.english: Ask the waiter or the head waiter, they can indicate the location.
responses.phonetic: peh-ruh-GOONNG-tih OW guh-ruh-SOHNG OHW OW SHEH-fih DIH SAH-luh, EH-lihsh PAW-dayng een-dee-KAHR AH loo-kuh-lee-zuh-SOWN.
responses.french: Pergunte ao garçom ou ao chefe de sala, eles podem indicar a localização.

phrases.text_local: Onde posso encontrar o terraço sobre a praia?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih PAW-soo ayng-koongt-RAHR AW teh-RAH-soo SOHB-rih AH PREYEUH?

likely_response.local: O terraço sobre a praia é uma das áreas do Restaurante O Camilo. Siga as placas para o terraço.
likely_response.pronunciation: AW teh-RAH-soo SOHB-rih AH PREYEUH EH OO-muh DUHSH AH-reeuhsh DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih AW kuh-MEE-loo. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo.
likely_response.translation_en: The beach terrace is one of the areas of Restaurante O Camilo. Follow the signs to the terrace.

responses.english: The beach terrace is one of the areas of Restaurante O Camilo. Follow the signs to the terrace.
responses.phonetic: AW teh-RAH-soo SOHB-rih AH PREYEUH EH OO-muh DUHSH AH-reeuhsh DOO rehsh-tow-RAHNNG-tih AW kuh-MEE-loo. SEE-guh UHSH PLAH-kuhsh PUH-ruh AW teh-RAH-soo.
responses.french: O terraço sobre a praia é uma das áreas do Restaurante O Camilo. Siga as placas para o terraço.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a caixa junto à entrada?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH KEYE-shuh ZHOONNG-too AH ayngt-RAH-duh?
phrases.cultural_note: In many Portuguese restaurants, the cashier is located near the entrance for convenience.

likely_response.local: Bom dia, está à porta de entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH AH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: Good morning, it is at the entrance door.

responses.english: Good morning, it is at the entrance door.
responses.phonetic: BOHNG DEEUH, ehs-TAH AH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: Bom dia, está à porta de entrada.

phrases.intent_en: Where is the traditional fishing room?
phrases.text_local: Onde fica a sala de pesca tradicional?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH SAH-luh DIH PEHSH-kuh truh-dee-seeoo-NAHL?
phrases.cultural_note: The traditional fishing room reflects the local fishing heritage of Nazaré.

phrases.text_local: O que recomenda de bom para comer aqui?
phrases.pronunciation: AW KIH reh-koo-MAYNG-duh DIH BOHNG PUH-ruh koo-MEHR uh-KEE?

likely_response.local: Peixe grelhado e cataplana de marisco, hoje.
likely_response.pronunciation: PAY-shih greh-LYAH-doo EH kuh-tuhp-LAHN-nuh DIH muh-REESH-koo, OH-zhih.
likely_response.translation_en: Ask the waiter about the grilled fish of the day and the seafood cataplana.

responses.english: Ask the waiter about the grilled fish of the day and the seafood cataplana.
responses.phonetic: PAY-shih greh-LYAH-doo EH kuh-tuhp-LAHN-nuh DIH muh-REESH-koo, OH-zhih.
responses.french: Peixe grelhado e cataplana de marisco, hoje.

phrases.text_local: Onde fica a caixa para pagar?
phrases.pronunciation: OHNG-dih FEE-kuh AH KEYE-shuh PUH-ruh puh-GAHR?

likely_response.local: A caixa fica junto à porta de entrada.
likely_response.pronunciation: AH KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
likely_response.translation_en: The cash desk is by the entrance door.

responses.english: The cash desk is by the entrance door.
responses.phonetic: AH KEYE-shuh FEE-kuh ZHOONNG-too AH PAW-ruh-tuh DIH ayngt-RAH-duh.
responses.french: A caixa fica junto à porta de entrada.
